title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Duval, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Something came out!! What is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You all know that, don't you....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That man who, all of a sudden,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Is He talking about us over here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: sent me to the depths of hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That guy wants to kill me...!?

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: Something recent!? This is getting more confusing!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: These Harpoons are dosed with Scorpion poison!!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.
